title: Skill & orchestrator docs: unified super-epic narrative
description:
Rewrite the skill's super-epic material as one consistent big-picture story (design §8). Blocks on the orchestration epic because the docs must reflect shipped behavior.

SKILL.md 'Roadmaps' becomes a unified section covering roadmaps + projects + buckets + dates with worked examples (show, not mandate). agent-runner.md gains the recursive-frontier / project-checkpoint rule. Convention ladder + container Definition-of-Ready land in tick-patterns.md or a new references/big-picture.md. Single-epic Steps 0–5 untouched.

Deliverables:
- rewritten SKILL.md big-picture section + 3 worked examples (dated release / nested projects / passive bucket)
- agent-runner.md stopping-rule update
- convention ladder + container DoR reference
notes:
2026-06-20 15:24 - RETRO (epic af5) — VERDICT SHIP.
Learnings: none newly promoted (the backtick-substitution gotcha was already promoted earlier this run; the section-rename cross-ref staleness was fixed inline).
Verification (review): all 3 docs (SKILL.md, agent-runner.md, big-picture.md) CLI-accurate (every tk command/flag verified vs cmd/tk/cmd), one consistent vocabulary, faithful to shipped behavior; single-epic Steps 0-5 + epic-close retro text intact.
Drift: 3 stale 'Roadmaps' cross-references after the section rename — found by review, fixed inline (no cleanup tick needed).
Roadmap changes proposed: none. Next feasible epic: 682 (tk tui) is GATED (--awaiting checkpoint) → roadmap end/checkpoint reached.
closed_reason: Completed: unified big-picture skill docs (SKILL.md rewrite + agent-runner.md stopping rule + big-picture.md) merged & green; final review SHIP
